# Geotecnia1 — Carapicuíba

> Geotechnical engineering services in Carapicuíba, Brasil.

## Services
- [Ancoragens](https://carapicuiba.geotecnia1.org/ancoragens/)
- [Cbr Viario](https://carapicuiba.geotecnia1.org/cbr-viario/)

- [Ensaio Placa Carga](https://carapicuiba.geotecnia1.org/ensaio-placa-carga/)

## Contact
- Website: https://carapicuiba.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Carapicuíba, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
